publications.title: Longitudinal biomarker dynamics in post-acute sequelae of SARS-CoV-2 infection
publications.abstract: Post-acute sequelae of SARS-CoV-2 (PASC) present with diverse symptoms. We tracked 50 biomarkers over 12 months in 890 patients, identifying persistent inflammatory signatures.

publications.title: Single-cell transcriptomics of innate immune responses to viral challenge
publications.abstract: Using scRNA-seq we profiled 200,000 PBMCs from 45 donors during acute viral infection, revealing novel myeloid activation states.

publications.title: Epigenetic regulation of T-cell exhaustion in chronic infection
publications.abstract: Chromatin accessibility profiling of exhausted CD8+ T cells reveals stepwise epigenetic remodeling during chronic viral infection.

publications.title: Deep learning for automated histopathology grading in renal biopsies
publications.abstract: A convolutional neural network trained on 12,000 annotated biopsy images achieves pathologist-level accuracy in grading glomerular lesions.

publications.title: Multi-omic integration reveals metabolic drivers of sepsis mortality
publications.abstract: Integrating transcriptomics, proteomics, and metabolomics from 1,200 ICU patients identifies mitochondrial dysfunction signatures predictive of 28-day mortality.

publications.title: Gut microbiome composition predicts response to immune checkpoint therapy
publications.abstract: Metagenomic sequencing of pre-treatment stool samples from 340 melanoma patients reveals microbial signatures associated with immunotherapy response.

publications.title: CRISPR-based screening identifies novel regulators of macrophage polarization
publications.abstract: Genome-wide CRISPR knockout screen in primary human macrophages identifies 47 previously unknown regulators of M1/M2 polarization.

publications.title: Spatial transcriptomics maps the tumor immune microenvironment
publications.abstract: Multiplexed spatial transcriptomics across 89 tumor samples reveals spatially organized immune niches predicting immunotherapy response.

publications.title: Machine learning prediction of antimicrobial resistance from whole-genome sequences
publications.abstract: Random forest and gradient boosting models trained on 15,000 bacterial genomes predict resistance phenotypes with 94% accuracy.

publications.title: Circulating tumor DNA dynamics during neoadjuvant immunotherapy
publications.abstract: Serial ctDNA monitoring in 230 NSCLC patients during neoadjuvant pembrolizumab reveals early molecular response signatures.

publications.title: Proteogenomic characterization of treatment-resistant acute myeloid leukemia
publications.abstract: Integrated proteogenomic analysis of 200 AML samples identifies druggable kinase fusions in treatment-resistant disease.

publications.title: Wearable biosensors for continuous immune monitoring in transplant recipients
publications.abstract: A wrist-worn biosensor measuring sweat cytokines provides real-time immune status monitoring in 80 kidney transplant recipients.

publications.title: Federated learning for multi-institutional clinical outcome prediction
publications.abstract: Privacy-preserving federated learning across 12 hospitals achieves centralised-equivalent accuracy for ICU mortality prediction.

publications.title: Long non-coding RNA atlas of human immune cell differentiation
publications.abstract: Comprehensive lncRNA profiling across 15 immune cell lineages identifies 340 lineage-specific transcripts with functional validation.

publications.title: Neoantigens from frameshift mutations drive anti-tumor immunity in microsatellite-unstable cancers
publications.abstract: Analysis of 600 MSI-H tumors reveals frameshift-derived neoantigens as dominant targets of tumor-infiltrating lymphocytes.

publications.title: Real-world effectiveness of CAR-T cell therapy in relapsed large B-cell lymphoma
publications.abstract: Registry analysis of 1,500 patients receiving commercial CAR-T products shows 42% complete response rate with distinct toxicity profiles by product.

publications.title: Interpretable AI models for clinical decision support in emergency medicine
publications.abstract: Gradient-boosted decision trees with SHAP explanations outperform black-box models for ED triage while maintaining clinician trust.

publications.title: Single-nucleus chromatin accessibility reveals epigenetic aging in the human kidney
publications.abstract: snATAC-seq of 120 human kidney samples spanning ages 20-80 maps cell-type-specific epigenetic clocks and identifies reversible aging signatures.

publications.title: Metabolomic profiling identifies novel biomarkers of acute kidney injury progression
publications.abstract: Untargeted metabolomics in 500 ICU patients identifies urinary acylcarnitines as early predictors of AKI progression to dialysis.

publications.title: Benchmarking foundation models for biomedical natural language processing
publications.abstract: Systematic evaluation of 12 large language models on 8 biomedical NLP benchmarks reveals task-specific performance gaps.

publications.title: Host genetics influence gut microbiome composition and COVID-19 severity
publications.abstract: GWAS of microbiome composition in 8,000 individuals identifies HLA variants associated with Prevotella abundance and COVID-19 outcomes.

publications.title: Multimodal imaging biomarkers for Alzheimer disease staging
publications.abstract: Combined PET-MRI biomarker panel improves staging accuracy from 72% to 91% in a prospective cohort of 400 patients.

publications.title: Nanopore sequencing enables rapid pathogen identification in bloodstream infections
publications.abstract: Oxford Nanopore direct-from-blood sequencing identifies pathogens in median 6 hours vs 48 hours for conventional culture.

publications.title: Digital twin modeling for personalized drug dosing in pediatric oncology
publications.abstract: Physiologically-based pharmacokinetic digital twins improve chemotherapy dosing precision in 150 pediatric ALL patients.

publications.title: Atlas of human tissue-resident memory T cells across 30 organs
publications.abstract: CyTOF and scRNA-seq profiling of tissue-resident memory T cells from 30 organs in 12 donors reveals organ-specific phenotypic programs.

publications.title: Explainable deep learning for ECG-based cardiac arrhythmia detection
publications.abstract: An attention-based deep neural network detects 12 arrhythmia types from single-lead ECG with cardiologist-level accuracy and visual explanations.

publications.title: Clonal dynamics of hematopoietic stem cells revealed by single-cell multi-omics
publications.abstract: Joint scRNA-seq and ATAC-seq with mitochondrial mutation tracking maps clonal architecture of human hematopoiesis across the lifespan.
